mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, customer.id AS customer_id, COALESCE(customer.company_name, ma.member_name, u.nick_name, u.username) AS customer_name FROM sys_user u JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = u.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.status = 'ENABLED' AND ma.member_type = 'CUSTOMER' JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.member_id = ma.id AND customer.deleted = 0 AND customer.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS user_id, merchant.id AS merchant_id, COALESCE(merchant.shop_name, ma.member_name, u.nick_name, u.username) AS operator_name FROM sys_user u JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = u.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.status = 'ENABLED' AND ma.member_type = 'MERCHANT' JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id AND merchant.deleted = 0 AND merchant.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(a.id AS CHAR) AS id, a.aftersale_no AS aftersale_no, o.order_no AS order_no, customer.company_name AS customer_name, merchant.shop_name AS merchant_name, a.aftersale_type AS aftersale_type, a.apply_amount AS apply_amount, a.aftersale_status AS aftersale_status, a.need_return AS need_return, COALESCE(a.return_tracking_no, '-') AS return_tracking_no, COALESCE(a.remark, '-') AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(a.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at FROM aftersale_info a JOIN order_info o ON o.id = a.order_id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = a.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = a.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY a.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM aftersale_info a JOIN order_info o ON o.id = a.order_id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = a.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT CAST(a.id AS CHAR) AS id, a.aftersale_no AS aftersale_no, o.order_no AS order_no, customer.company_name AS customer_name, merchant.shop_name AS merchant_name, a.aftersale_type AS aftersale_type, a.apply_amount AS apply_amount, a.aftersale_status AS aftersale_status, a.need_return AS need_return, COALESCE(a.return_tracking_no, '-') AS return_tracking_no, COALESCE(a.remark, '-') AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(a.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at FROM aftersale_info a JOIN order_info o ON o.id = a.order_id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = a.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = a.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND merchant.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY a.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM aftersale_info a JOIN order_info o ON o.id = a.order_id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = a.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND merchant.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aftersale_info ( aftersale_no, order_id, customer_id, merchant_id, aftersale_type, reason_type, reason_desc, apply_amount, approved_amount, aftersale_status, need_return, return_tracking_no, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{aftersaleNo}, #{orderId}, #{customerId}, #{merchantId}, #{aftersaleType}, #{reasonType}, #{reasonDesc}, #{applyAmount}, #{approvedAmount}, #{aftersaleStatus}, #{needReturn}, #{returnTrackingNo}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO aftersale_item ( aftersale_id, order_item_id, sku_id, spu_name, sku_name, spec_text, quantity, apply_amount ) VALUES
( #{item.aftersaleId}, #{item.orderItemId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.spuName}, #{item.skuName}, #{item.specText}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.applyAmount} )

INSERT INTO aftersale_audit_log ( aftersale_id, action_type, old_status, new_status, operator_id, operator_name, remark ) VALUES ( #{aftersaleId}, #{actionType}, #{oldStatus}, #{newStatus}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.aftersale_no, a.order_id, o.order_no, a.customer_id, a.merchant_id, a.aftersale_type, a.apply_amount, a.approved_amount, o.pay_amount AS order_pay_amount, o.used_points AS order_used_points, a.aftersale_status, a.need_return, a.return_tracking_no FROM aftersale_info a JOIN order_info o ON o.id = a.order_id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.id = #{aftersaleId} AND a.customer_id = #{customerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.aftersale_no, a.order_id, o.order_no, a.customer_id, a.merchant_id, a.aftersale_type, a.apply_amount, a.approved_amount, o.pay_amount AS order_pay_amount, o.used_points AS order_used_points, a.aftersale_status, a.need_return, a.return_tracking_no FROM aftersale_info a JOIN order_info o ON o.id = a.order_id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.id = #{aftersaleId} AND a.merchant_id = #{merchantId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_record ( order_id, aftersale_id, record_type, pay_method, pay_amount, voucher_file_id, transaction_no, pay_status, confirmed_by, confirmed_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{aftersaleId}, 'REFUND', #{payMethod}, #{payAmount}, #{voucherFileId}, #{transactionNo}, 'REFUNDED', #{confirmedBy}, NOW(), #{remark} )

INSERT INTO product_stock_log ( sku_id, change_type, change_qty, before_qty, after_qty, biz_type, biz_id, remark, operated_by ) VALUES ( #{skuId}, #{changeType}, #{changeQty}, #{beforeQty}, #{afterQty}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{remark}, #{operatedBy} )
